layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content sections spanning the full slide width below the title. The left column presents Manufacturing KPCs as a numbered enumeration list with brand-colored badges and dashed separators. The right column presents J&J core capabilities as a bullet list with brand-colored circle markers and dashed separators. Both columns share identical top and bottom edges, creating a unified horizontal alignment. A full-width key takeaway bar sits at the bottom of the slide with brand accent fill and white text. The layout uses generous vertical spacing to distribute content evenly across the available slide height, with dashed separator lines providing visual rhythm between sections. No outer container is used — the columns sit directly on the slide background with consistent left and right margins.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.48, 0.48, 0.04]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Manufacturing KPCs): Left column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at the left margin with a small inset from the slide edge. Contains a numbered enumeration list with three major items. Each item has a brand-colored filled square badge (small corner radius) with white bold enumeration number (1, 2, 3) centered inside, positioned at the left edge of each row section. The badge is small and proportional to body text height — a visual guide, not a focal point. Item heading text (Game quality, Proven performance, Incumbent advantage) sits immediately to the right of each badge, bold, brand primary color, left-aligned. Body text for each item sits below the heading within the same row section, body font, brand text color, left-aligned with a small left inset matching the heading text start position. Row sections are separated by thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines spanning the full column width from the left edge of the text to the right edge of the column. No separator after the last item. All three row sections use equal flexGrow values to distribute vertical space evenly across the column height. Content is vertically centered within the available space between the title area and the key takeaway bar at the bottom.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — J&J core capabilities): Right column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at the right side of the slide with a small gap separating it from the left column. Top and bottom edges align exactly with the left column. Contains a section header 'J&J core capabilities' at the top (bold, brand primary color, left-aligned), followed by a bullet list with six major bullet points. Each bullet point uses a small brand-colored filled circle as the bullet marker (proportional to body text height, vertically centered with the first line of text). Bullet text is body font, brand text color, left-aligned, starting immediately after the circle marker with a small gap. The six bullets are grouped into three logical sections based on content themes: (1) regulatory navigation and Epic acquisition (2 bullets), (2) credibility and balance sheet flexibility (2 bullets), (3) competitive advantages (2 bullets). Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between these three logical sections (2 separators total, positioned between bullets 2–3 and 4–5). No separator after the last bullet. All content distributed evenly across the column height using flexGrow on row sections to match the vertical rhythm of the left column. The column shares the same vertical start and end positions as the left column, creating a unified horizontal alignment across both columns.
  C2 (KEY TAKEAWAY BAR): Full-width horizontal bar at the bottom of the slide, spanning from left margin to right margin. Fill: light brand accent color (tinted version of brand primary, not saturated). Height: compact — just enough to contain the text with a small top and bottom inset. No border. Slight corner rounding on all four corners for a soft, polished appearance. Text inside: 'Key takeaway: Though new manufacturing entrants face hurdles to displace incumbent game providers, J&J's core capabilities, strong financial position and brand reputation position the company well to capture share in Minnesota' — body font, brand dark text color (not white, for readability on the light accent fill), left-aligned with a small left inset, vertically centered. The bar sits with a visible gap above it, separating it from the bottom edge of the two content columns above.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Not active. The slide content (two columns + key takeaway bar) fills the available space effectively. No visual grouping or background fill is needed beyond the key takeaway bar itself.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Not active. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this slide. The two columns are independent content sections with no visual links between them.
